Un paarvai podhum
vaanam mele nilavu thaevayillai.

Anbe anbe
en kannil vilundhaai.
Anbe anbe

Anbe anbe
yaen vittu pirindhaai.
anbe anbe
puyal pole kadandhaai.

Un udan naan vazhndha
nodigal podhum

Un viral tharum podhum

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Darling, the song Anbe Anbe serves as a poignant expression of love and yearning. The lyrics beautifully convey the emotions of longing and the impact of love on one's heart and soul. GV Prakash Kumar's soulful rendition enhances the romantic vibe, making it a perfect fit for intimate moments. This song encapsulates the essence of romance, making it relatable for anyone who has loved deeply.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Anbe Anbe from Darling is a soul-stirring melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With GV Prakash Kumar's enchanting vocals and Na Muthukumar's poignant lyrics, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the beauty of romance. Dive into the heartfelt emotions of this track that beautifully blends melody and sentiment.
stanzaMeanings: Your gaze is enough, the moon in the sky is not needed. Your presence is enough, flowers are not needed anywhere on earth.
Oh beloved, you have slipped into my eyes. Oh beloved, you have woven into my heart. Oh beloved, why have you left me? Oh beloved, you have passed like a storm.
Your gaze is enough, the moon in the sky is not needed. Your presence is enough, flowers are not needed anywhere on earth.
Oh beloved, you have slipped into my eyes.
Love is not a good thing, it is a sin. Even if I forget, you are still with me.
Even if all the eyes come together, they cannot fulfill the dream of you coming.
The days I lived with you are enough, this life is a burden.
When you give your hand, thinking of the victories, my heart will feel pain.
Oh beloved, you have slipped into my eyes. Oh beloved, you have woven into my heart. Oh beloved, why have you left me? Oh beloved, you have passed like a storm.
Love is like a temple that no one can enter, it changes me. I will search for love, where are you today?
Where do the tears fall and close the eyes, where is my god?
Listening to your voice, my days will always be bright.
Oh beloved, you have slipped into my eyes. Oh beloved, you have woven into my heart. Oh beloved, why have you left me? Oh beloved, you have passed like a storm.
